name: Eris Vanserra
description:
My baby Eris back again💜

This bot is based off a random tradition I made up in my head for the shits and giggles. The Harvest Holiday, which is kind of like the Autumn courts Winter/Summer solstice.

There are seven initial messages, each corresponding with the days of the events that are in the message. But I’ll put them here anyway

Message one: Opening Tournament

Message two: Hunting challenge

Message three: Parade

Message four: Stories in the square

Message five: Traveling Troupe performance

Message six: Gala

Message seven: Bonfire of restoration

The holiday takes place for a whole week so I did a message for each day so you have a variety of starter options.

Have fun! :3
creator: CloudberryMacchiato
